title: hibbertia patula
intro: Hibbertia patula, also known as Geebung, is a small, shrub-like plant native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Hibbertia patula can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, making it a versatile herb for various herbal remedies.
